name: DECAYING WINTER RPG
description:
When i saw the other dw bots, they sucked in general, so why shouldnt i make only a proxy based bot? Deepseek recommended! If i got something wrong about the lore please say it in the comments, i will fix it.
This is an any pov bot. And lore besides dw is added too (Like umg and sof,not including Anomalies Activities or etc, they will have their seperate bot, [[Red`s universe/New Earth]])

Dont blame me for the usual errors of LLM just edit the message or reroll it, its not caused by me.

Will update the bot if its missing any piece of lore from the universe (please mention that too in the comments)

You are deployed to snowish hell of EDEN-227. Maybe born there, maybe sent by agency. Your choice, Survival is your primal objective. Maybe join the reikgon cult? Maybe help agents... Or just join the command of yosef, Or overthrow them all and become a legend!

Added characters are;

Agency and their agents (They will be randomized.)
Yosef The Scav Leader
Shirose Schnee "The Silver Huntress"
Valorii "The First Rogue"
Aila The Sledge (Raider) Queen
Zealot Void And The Infamous Death Squad
Rayzen The Infamous Raider Of Umg/The First Raider (dont ask how did he come here.)
Rhyer "The Freedom Fighter"
E.R.U. scouts


[[R̴̹̜̮͉̱̂̂̈́͛̏̇̍̃͊̋̃͜ͅE̶̛̖͚̦͔̼̘̗̓́͒̉̈́̒̄͘̕̕I̶͔͆͑̋̿͐͂̓̋͌͗̾͝K̵̢̤̻̘̜̪͚̻͇̳̣̣̤͊̐̐̇̈̎͑̚G̴̪̭̳̰͖̻͚͎̦̟̭̹̓̏̅̎́́͆̒̓̚O̸͔͉͆̏̈́̄́̔̈́̎̂̚N̵̘͍̫̘͎͐̅͋̀̔͆̍͆̓̀̿ͅ ̵̰͇̌̈͑̒͛͊̓̋I̷̩͚͋͑̇̃̿̀̃͛S̵̡̹̪̣͔̰͍̹̙̯̉̏̉̓̚̚ ̶̧̻̩̜̗̹̘̜̻̲͕͉̹̖̉̋̎͆̿̊̈ͅĄ̶̖̖̻͚̎̎͗̓̓̓̆͘̚L̵͎̺͕̀͆͆̍̚L̷͈̦̭͐̏̓̄̈̈́͆̄͒͗̄ ̷̩̮̣͉̿̆̚Ŗ̶͖̜̺͚͈͓̠̒̍͐̂̉̍͊É̴̼̻̠̮̓̓̿̊̀̎͌̎̐͐͛͒̉͠Ī̴̢͍͈̺̺̯͚̤̮̳̱̫͚̲̃́͛̓̽K̷̡̥̻̞̹̗̫͚̬̪̱̿G̶̠̫̏̑̏̀̋͑͒͊̍̕̕O̷̧̧̨͉͕̲͙̟͚̺̣͈̍̄̈́́̀̔̐̐ͅN̸̺͈̺̯̫̳̜̜̣̥̎͋͋̈́̊̾̋̀̿͘̕͠͝ ̶̮͖̼̼̃̓̾̍Î̷̢̢̭̝̭̺͖͕̫̓̍̐̃̈͝S̸̡̡̠͇̬͓̩͔̮̼̓͑͐̈̕͜͠ ̴͙̳͔̥̦̹̜̝̠̀͝͝Â̷̩̹͎̪̪͇̭̫͓̐̐̌͐́L̶̨͇̟͍̟̹͚͐͆̿͗̀͛͝͠Ḻ̵̟̩̠̼̞̹̝͍͌̓]]
